artifacts.title: Love receipt from 2024-09-14
artifacts.excerpt:
Braiding my hair at sunset.
Preparing a coffee or tea at sunrise.
Singing a mantra in the shower.
Transmitting energy into my water.

… how many more ways can I create ritual around daily life? It becomes a game. A practice. Embodiment. A way of life. 

Sanctify the ordinary.
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: love, heart, way, life.
